g.data-narration: The Wumpus World is a classic AI problem for logical reasoning under uncertainty.
The Wumpus World is a 4x4 grid-based AI problem where an agent must find gold while avoiding deadly pits and a monster using logical inference.
g.text: The Wumpus World is a classic AI problem for testing logical reasoning under uncertainty.
An agent navigates a 4x4 cave to find gold while avoiding pits and a monster called
the Wumpus. This problem demonstrates knowledge representation and inference.

g.data-narration: The environment is a 4x4 grid. Agent starts at 1,1 facing right. Contains one Wumpus, pits, and gold. Pits and Wumpus cannot be in the starting room.
Five percepts: Stench means Wumpus nearby, Breeze means pit nearby, Glitter means gold here, Bump means wall hit, Scream means Wumpus killed.
Six actions: Move Forward, Turn Left, Turn Right, Shoot one arrow, Grab gold, and Climb out only from start.
Performance scores: plus 1000 for escaping with gold, minus 1000 for dying, minus 1 per action, minus 10 for using arrow. Agent wants maximum score.
Logical rules: Breeze implies adjacent pit, Stench implies adjacent Wumpus. A room is safe if it has no pit AND no Wumpus.
g.text: Symbols: P(i,j)=Pit | W(i,j)=Wumpus | B(i,j)=Breeze | S(i,j)=Stench | G(i,j)=Gold | OK(i,j)=Safe
OK(i,j) implies not P and not W
B(i,j) arrow Breeze - Pit adjacent | S arrow Stench - Wumpus nearby | OK arrow Safe - no pit, no Wumpus

g.data-narration: Agent reasons using forward chaining from percepts to inference to action, or backward chaining from goal to requirements to path.

g.text: From percepts, infer state of adjacent rooms
Build mental map of safe and dangerous rooms
Use logical rules to eliminate possibilities

g.data-narration: At start 1,1, no breeze means no pits adjacent, no stench means no Wumpus adjacent. Therefore rooms 1,2 and 2,1 are safe to move.
g.text: Agent starts at 1,1, initial percepts: No Breeze, No Stench
not B(1,1) implies not P(1,2) and not P(2,1)
not S(1,1) implies not W(1,2) and not W(2,1)

g.data-narration: Stench at 1,2 means Wumpus is adjacent. Since 1,1 is safe, Wumpus must be in 1,3 or 2,2. Agent marks both as potentially dangerous.
g.text: Agent moves to 1,2, detects STENCH but no breeze
S(1,2) implies W(1,1) or W(1,3) or W(2,2)
No breeze equals no pits nearby.

g.data-narration: Breeze at 2,1 indicates a pit is adjacent. Since 1,1 is safe, the pit must be in 2,2 or 3,1. Agent avoids these rooms.
g.text: Agent at 2,1, detects BREEZE - what can be inferred
B(2,1) implies P(1,1) or P(2,2) or P(3,1)

g.data-narration: Remember: Percepts - Stench Breeze Glitter Bump Scream. Safe Room means no pit and no Wumpus. Use logic to infer room safety.
